name: issue_id_present
expression: issue_id IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(issue_id)) > 0
description: issue_id is required for Issue Management Record extraction.

name: issue_title_present
expression: issue_title IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(issue_title)) > 0
description: issue_title is required for Issue Management Record extraction.

name: status_present
expression: status IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(status)) > 0
description: status is required for Issue Management Record extraction.
